title: cybianthus guyanensis subsp. guyanensis
intro: Cybianthus guyanensis subsp. guyanensis is a plant species belonging to the family Primulaceae, commonly referred to as the "wild rose" or "Guyanese wild rose". The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits associated with Cybianthus guyanensis subsp. guyanensis include relief from coughs, colds, and fever, as well as its potential to combat various bacterial and fungal infections. Cybianthus guyanensis subsp. guyanensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
